**Determining strike announcement**

I need to analyze whether the document is announcing a new or upcoming strike. The Italian content indicates a national public transport strike where 10.1% of Atac staff participated. Although the title mentions a strike, the document discusses participation after the strike has already occurred on 02/05/2023. So, my conclusion is: this document is not announcing a new strike; it's merely reporting on participation in a strike that has already taken place.
